ksa_text: Ability to assess, evaluate, and monitor compliance with organizational and regulatory privacy requirements across systems, services, and business agreements.

dcwf.top_element_label: Facilitate cross-sharing of best practices for data usage.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Facilitate cross-sharing of best practices for data usage.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Security & Platform Strategy is a primary or secondary domain for the AI Innovation Lead. This ability KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (senior specialist).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Security & Platform Strategy), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Framework signal is weak (composite 0.427). External validation of this ability KSA for the AI Innovation Lead role relies primarily on domain-level alignment rather than specific framework matches.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: NIST CSF, CMU SEI enterprise security frameworks, and CDAIO job market data consistently include security and platform strategy oversight for senior data leaders.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: domain-level relevance of Security & Platform Strategy for the AI Innovation Lead is corroborated by DAMA-DMBOK, CDO survey data, and role-specific job market analysis, despite weak cross-framework signal.

decision_rationale: Security & Platform Strategy ability KSA is within scope for the AI Innovation Lead at the senior specialist tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
